name: Double Cheese Spam Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, cut into strips (12 oz)
2 tbsp Grated Parmesan or Romano cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, dissolve yeast in warm milk and water.
2. Add butter, sugar, parsley flakes, salt, garlic powder, egg, and 1 1/2 cups flour. Blend on low speed for half a minute, scraping the bowl constantly.
3. Beat on high speed for three minutes, scraping the bowl occasionally.
4. Stir in remaining flour and Cheddar cheese until smooth. Cover; let dough rise in a warm place until doubled, about 40 minutes. (The dough may be refrigerated 2-24 hours before baking.)
5. Preheat oven to 350°F.
6. Spread dough evenly on a well-greased pizza pan or 13x9-inch baking pan.
7. Arrange SPAM strips on top of the dough, pressing down slightly.
8. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown. Sprinkle Mozzarella and Parmesan cheeses over SPAM.
9. Continue baking for 5 minutes longer or until cheese is melted.
